title: Settings
intro: Configure the assistant’s model service: combined with environment variables; saving writes to your user profile on this computer, and an open project can add project-specific values that take precedence.
saveScopeGlobalHint: No project is open: saving writes to your user profile and applies to all projects.
saveScopeProjectHint: A project is open: saving writes to that project; project-specific values take precedence when they differ from your profile on this computer.
providerHint: Choose who hosts the models. Recommended addresses and names apply when you switch service; you can still edit them.
providerOpenaiCompatDesc: Third-party or self-hosted endpoints that use the same request shape as common OpenAI-style gateways; enter the full service URL.
providerDeepseekDesc: DeepSeek hosted API with suggested address and model names.
applyRecommended: Use recommended service address and model names
modelBaseUrlHint: Leave empty for the default hosted endpoint; enter a full URL for self-hosted or proxy setups.
fastModelHint: May match the primary model for light steps.
accessKeySourceUser: A token is saved in your user profile.
accessKeySourceProject: A token is saved in the current project.
accessKeySourceBoth: Tokens exist in both your profile and the current project; the project value is used.
accessKeyPlaceholder: Only updates when you type a new value; leave blank to keep the current one.
safetyHint: Choose whether destructive actions need your confirmation.

moderato.label: Moderato
moderato.desc: Creates, edits, and deletes need your confirmation; read-only actions run immediately.

allegro.label: Allegro
allegro.desc: Creates run immediately; edits and deletes need confirmation.

vivace.label: Vivace
vivace.desc: Most actions run immediately; high-risk steps get a quick check, with confirmation only when something looks risky.

prestissimo.label: Prestissimo
prestissimo.desc: All actions run immediately with no confirmation prompts.

footerNote: Settings are stored under your user profile or the current project; do not commit secrets to public repos.
confirmClearKey: Clear the access token stored in this project? After that, environment configuration applies if present.
confirmClearKeyUser: Clear the access token stored in your user profile? After that, environment configuration applies if present.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.intro: These components are large and are not bundled with the installer. Install them as needed; features become available once installed.
ext.ocrPartial: The recognition engine was found. If OCR still fails, ensure the optional OCR add-on shipped with the app is installed on this machine.
ext.installDialogProgress: Opening the install window, please wait…
